hero.headline: Securing Your Financial Future
hero.subtitle: Expert guidance for retirement planning, tax strategies, and wealth preservation — tailored to your goals.

services.heading: Our Services
services.subheading: Comprehensive financial solutions for every stage of life

retirement.title: Retirement Planning
retirement.description: Build a personalized retirement strategy that ensures financial security and peace of mind for your golden years.

socialSecurity.title: Social Security Evaluation
socialSecurity.description: Maximize your Social Security benefits with expert analysis of your options and optimal claiming strategies.

taxStrategies.title: Tax Strategies
taxStrategies.description: Reduce your tax burden with proactive planning and strategies designed to keep more money in your pocket.

estatePlanning.title: Estate Planning
estatePlanning.description: Protect your legacy and ensure your assets are distributed according to your wishes with comprehensive estate planning.

lifeInsurance.title: Life Insurance
lifeInsurance.description: Safeguard your family's future with the right life insurance coverage tailored to your needs and budget.

wealthManagement.title: Wealth Management
wealthManagement.description: Grow and preserve your wealth with diversified investment strategies and ongoing portfolio management.

businessPlanning.title: Business Planning
businessPlanning.description: Strategic financial planning for business owners — from succession planning to key person insurance.

whyUs.heading: Because Tomorrow Matters
whyUs.description: At Lomeli Financial Group, we believe that financial security isn't a luxury — it's a necessity. We work with business owners, professionals, and families to create customized strategies that protect what matters most.

personalized.title: Personalized Approach
personalized.description: Every plan is tailored to your unique financial goals and life circumstances.

bilingual.title: Bilingual Service
bilingual.description: We proudly serve our community in both English and Spanish.

trusted.title: Trusted Expertise
trusted.description: Licensed professionals dedicated to your long-term financial success.

comprehensive.title: Comprehensive Solutions
comprehensive.description: From retirement to estate planning, all your financial needs under one roof.

contact.heading: Let's Talk About Your Future
contact.subheading: Schedule a free consultation and take the first step toward financial security.
